title: InputaModpackName
description: This is a modpack focused on the create mod and mixed with exploration!
body:
InputaModpackName is a modpack that seamlessly blends industrial complexity with breathtaking exploration. Designed for those who want more than just a sandbox, this pack challenges you to engineer continent-spanning logistics networks while surviving an overhauled, atmospheric world.

## 🏗️ The Industrial Revolution (Create & More)
At its core, InputaModpackName is built around the **Create Mod** and its most powerful industrial extensions.

- Heavy Industry: Scale your production with **The Factory Must Grow** (TFMG), adding realistic oil processing, casting, and advanced metallurgy.

- Energy & Sorcery: Master the elements with **Create: New Age** and automate the mystical with **Create: Enchantment Industry**.

- Logistics Mastery: Build intricate rail networks with **Create: Steam 'n' Rails** and find your way in them with **Create Railways Navigator**.

- Specialized Addons: From **Create: Ore Excavation** for automated mining to **Slice & Dice** for culinary automation, every aspect of the vanilla game has a mechanical solution.


## 🧭 An Epic Journey (Exploration & World Gen)
The world of InputaModpackName is vast, beautiful, and dangerous.


- Infinite Horizons: Experience massive render distances without sacrificing performance thanks to **Distant Horizons**.

- Overhauled Landscapes: Wander through hundreds of unique biomes from **Biomes O' Plenty** mixed with **Terralith**. generated with the smooth transitions of **TerraBlender**.

- Aerial Discovery: Construct and pilot your own fleet of **Immersive Aircraft** to scout the land from above.


- Hidden Depths: Discover **Underground Villages** and sprawling ruins, but be prepared—enemies are tougher, and survival is paramount.

## 🍱 Living Off the Land
Whether you're a nomadic explorer or a stationary tycoon, the pack provides deep systems for daily life.

- Culinary Arts: Master the kitchen with **Farmer's Delight** and its various expansions, including the **Create: Central Kitchen** for automated mass-production.


- Advanced Storage: Keep your resources organized with **Tom's Simple Storage** and carry everything you need in **Sophisticated Backpacks**.


- Atmospheric Immersion: Every cave and forest feels alive with **Ambient Sounds** and **Sound Physics Remastered**, while Particlerain adds a new layer of weather depth.


## 🎨 Visual Excellence
InputaModpackName is pre-configured to look like a modern title right out of the box.

- Premium Shaders: Featuring **Complementary Unbound** paired with **Euphoria Patches**, delivering stunning lighting, shadows, and water effects.


- Visual Polish: Small details like **Not Enough Animations**, **Skin Layers 3D**, and **First-person Model** transform the feel of your character.

- Dynamic UI: Includes **Jade** for block information, **JourneyMap** for navigation, and **Advancement Plaques** for that RPG feel.

## 🛠️ Technical Setup & Recommendations

To ensure your gears turn smoothly and the horizons stay distant, we recommend the following:

- : **3,5GB** is the minimum, but **6GB** is highly recommended for the best experience, especially with **Distant Horizons** and Shaders active.

- First Launch: Give the game a moment! On your first world load, **Distant Horizons** will begin pre-generating terrain LODs. Performance will stabilize significantly once the initial generation is finished.

## 🤝 Support the Project

If you enjoy the balance of engineering and exploration in InputaModpackName, come be a part of our journey!
- Follow the Project: Follow us here on Modrinth to get notified the moment we release performance updates or new content.

- Join the Discord: [Join our community server](https://discord.gg/4FmZGPn72d) to share your creations, get technical support, and find other engineers to play with!

### _**"The world is a machine waiting for its master. How will you leave your mark?"**_
